svg.title: Medallion vs Raw-Staging-Mart architecture comparison
svg.desc: Two parallel pipelines showing how raw data flows through either Bronze-Silver-Gold (Medallion) or Raw-Staging-Mart layers to reach analysts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What goes in the Bronze layer of medallion architecture?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the Silver layer of medallion architecture?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the Gold layer of medallion architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is the raw layer in dbt architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the staging layer do in dbt?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the mart layer in dbt?')

svg.text: Both patterns move data left→right: messier → cleaner → business-ready
